name: Segmented control

constraints.note: Description says 2-3 typical, up to 5 max. All segments have equal width.

variants.name: text
variants.description: Segments show text labels. Sentence case. Descriptive and specific.

variants.name: icon
variants.description: Segments show icons only. Must use universally understood icons. Always accompanied by tooltips.

selected_value.note: Do not preselect if choice is critical.

width.note: fill: stretches to parent. hug: sized to widest item.

label.note: Used as tooltip text when icon-only. Sentence case.

icon.note: If any segment has icon, all must be icon-only.

sizing.height: Fixed, determined by label/icon plus padding

inner_selected.note: Inner selected segment uses smaller radius to reflect nesting

decision_guide.segmented_vs_radio: Segmented control: 2–5 options, mode/view switching, always visible, compact UI. Radio button: longer labels, more options, or when selection semantics are important.
decision_guide.segmented_vs_tab: Segmented control: switches modes or views within a component. Tab: organises full page sections.
decision_guide.segmented_vs_toggle_button: Segmented control: mutually exclusive single selection. Toggle button: independent on/off per button.

usage_rules.detail: Segmented control supports a minimum of 2 and maximum of 5 segments. For more options, use Radio button or Dropdown.

usage_rules.rule: All segments either text or icon — never mixed
usage_rules.detail: Within one segmented control, all segments must use the same type: all text labels or all icons. Never mix text and icon segments.
When using icon-only segments, every segment must be accompanied by a tooltip using the label as tooltip text.
Only use icons whose meaning is universally clear without a label. Ambiguous icons must use text labels instead.
All segment items must have the same width within a single segmented control.

usage_rules.rule: Do not preselect for critical choices
usage_rules.detail: Only preselect if the choice is not critical. Once selected, user cannot return to no selection.
All segment text labels must use sentence case.

usage_rules.rule: Use for mode/view switching not navigation
usage_rules.detail: Use segmented control to switch modes or views within a component (e.g. list vs tile view). For page-level navigation, use Tabs.

accessibility.tooltip_required: When icon-only: tooltip must be present on each segment

confidence_blockers: If ticket requests more than 5 segments, flag — use Radio button or Dropdown instead.
If ticket mixes text and icon segments, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket uses icon segments without specifying tooltips, flag.
If ticket uses segmented control for full page navigation, suggest Tab instead.

embedding_text: Segmented control component. Mode view switcher toggle group. 2 to 5 equal-width segments. All text or all icon never mixed. Icon segments require tooltips universally understood metaphors. One selection at a time. Sentence case labels. For mode switching within component not page navigation. Use Tab for page sections.
